---
title: "Resident and Fellow Phone Numbers"
category: "Contact Information"
section_id: "resident-fellow-numbers"
last_updated: "2026-07-01"
source: "UF Neurology Resident Handbook 2026-2027"
---

# Resident and Fellow Phone Numbers

| **Residents** |  |  |  |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Alex (PGY4) | 317-987-8085 | Maria Rodriguez  PGY4 | 330-734-7880 |
| Bettarelli (PGY1) | 469-631-1212 | Marino (PGY1) | 804-436-6928 |
| Campbell (PGY3) | 631-827-4839 | Namrouti (PGY1) | 813-507-6170 |
| Caputo (PGY2) | 718-208-3193 | Patel (PGY4) | 772-828-0039 |
| Carter (PGY3) | 813-300-2533 | Pirwani (PGY4) | 518-390-1169 |
| Crawford (PGY3) | 972-849-9063 | Remley (PGY4) | 904-759-5600 |
| Edwards (PGY2) | 818-914-1708 | Sanapoori (PGY1) | 408-320-7432 |
| Garrison (PGY3) | 321-298-7062 | Saini (PGY2) | 954-774-2374 |
| Glueck (PGY3) | 253-330-0359 | Sewell (PGY1) | 813-347-8771 |
| Gozman (PGY4) | 347-432-5660 | Siegel (PGY3) | 814-504-5247 |
| Kagel (PGY1) | 757-969-2596 | Silva (PGY2) | 763-337-3761 |
| King (PGY4) | 601-549-4582 | Starcher (PGY1) | 304-376-2400 |
| Klaus (PGY2) | 352-209-4513 | Stidham (PGY2) | 423-608-8060 |
| Le (PGY3) | 571-289-7062 | Varde (PGY3) | 904-200-8545 |
| Leone (PGY1) | 412-657-4309 | Wehrer (PGY2) | 814-490-1318 |
| Li (PGY2) | 571-527-6836 | Weston (PGY4) | 813-416-4791 |
| **Fellows** |  |  |  |
| Amdelmasih (EP) | 813-325-7474 | Graese (MOV) | 843-801-4917 |
| Abolazli (EP) | 310-749-2646 | Gupta (MOV) | 978-799-1333 |
| Abraham (NM) | 724-815-6190 | Hernandez (VAS) | 239-691-2251 |
| Azeem (MS) | 720-434-9466 | Kendirili (ICU EEG) | 336-602-3189 |
| Barnes (MOV) | 516-857-3605 | Martinez Nunez (MOV) | 313-516-0661 |
| Baumann (VAS) | 352-201-1505 | Meeses Quiroz (NCC) | 312-730-7072 |
| Bhaskar (MS) | 704-779-6045 | Mehta (MOV) | 573-452-3806 |
| Bhatia (NCC) | 832-275-4350 | Mufuka (Headache) | 843-599-1797 |
| Carranza Renteria BEH | 352-756-6246 | Purks (MOV) | 781-275-9838 |
| Culpepper (NCC) | 540-779-3241 | Rodrigues (NCC) | 502-601-1647 |
| Darusz (SNT) | 216-280-8853 | R. Marques Ferreira (ICU EEG) | 612-987-9051 |
| Fenn (MOV) | 614-547-9326 | Weinstein (VAS) | 850-585-9354 |
| Garcia-Ramiu (NCC) | 405-501-2397 |  |  |

| **Faculty ** |
| --- |
| Ameli | 407-489-7679 |
| Armstrong | 443-613-2469 |
| Benkli | 713-548-3456 |
| Bruzzone | 708-790-5822 |
| Buchowicz | 475-227-9832 |
| Burks | 352-562-2450 |
| Burns | 847-644-3561 |
| Busl | 617-820-9858 |
| Carneiro | 857-930-9914 |
| Cibula | 352-642-2645 |
| Da Silva | 312-722-7582 |
| Eisenschenk | 352-262-9114 |
| Fanty | 281-460-5679 |
